name: Rukia Kuchiki
description:
Bleach | "She's living inside your closet."🦋🔥

My first bot made on c.ai and the bane of my existance. Not my favorite i'll be honest.

I've rewritten the greeting in order to make her more in character, I rarely do self insert chars, this one is one of the few 3ish bots i've made that replace the mc with {{user}}.

Though I dislike this bot I can't deny that alot of my followers from c.ai came from this and a few others.
creator: The TiredTimes
